name: Smashy Bird 3D
description: Tap to crush as many birds as possible before they escape! In Smashy Bird 3D, colorful birds fly through dangerous moving pipes and your mission is simple: smash them fast and don’t let a single one get away. The more birds you crush, the higher your score! Easy to play, hard to master, with fast arcade action, funny animations, and addictive gameplay that keeps you coming back for one more try. How many birds can you smash before one escapes?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
